channel.title: Luanti Mods Feed
channel.description: Latest Luanti mods from Github, Gitlab, and Codeberg

item.title: luanti-developerconsole (Github)
item.author: sfan5
item.description:
sfan5
Web-based REPL for Luanti
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: balls (Codeberg)
item.author: Sheriff_U3
item.description:
Sheriff_U3
A Luanti mod that adds balls
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: energy_drinks (Codeberg)
item.author: Sheriff_U3
item.description:
Sheriff_U3
A mod that adds energy drinks to the luanti game engine.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: place_names (Github)
item.author: bas080
item.description:
bas080
Luanti Mod that adds command to create, edit place names that are visible on player hud.
License: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1
Download ZIP

item.title: arena_lib (Gitlab)
item.author: zughy-friends-minetest
item.description:
zughy-friends-minetest
Luanti library working as a core manager for any minigame you have in mind
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: panel_lib (Gitlab)
item.author: zughy-friends-minetest
item.description:
zughy-friends-minetest
Library for Luanti allowing modders to create complex scoreboards in an easy way
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: coins (Codeberg)
item.author: kmdev
item.description:
kmdev
A mod for Luanti that adds coins in to the game
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: digital_storage (Codeberg)
item.author: kmdev
item.description:
kmdev
A Luanti mod that brings Digital Storage to the game. Inspired by Refined Storage
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: vines (Github)
item.author: bas080
item.description:
bas080
Climbable vines, shears to harvest them and a rope box to help you climb.
License: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1
Download ZIP

item.title: little_lake (Github)
item.author: bas080
item.description:
bas080
Simple mod that spawns little lakes in caves near the surface and on mountains.
License: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1
Download ZIP

item.title: circuits (Codeberg)
item.author: Sheriff_U3
item.description:
Sheriff_U3
A circuitry mod for Luanti
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: welcome (Gitlab)
item.author: luno_luanti
item.description:
luno_luanti
[Minetest Mod] Displays a window with the latest newspaper news. Along with buttons for: Rules, Story, Hints.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: country_lib (Gitlab)
item.author: zughy-friends-minetest
item.description:
zughy-friends-minetest
small util library for Luanti, providing country localised names and flags
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: Block League (Gitlab)
item.author: zughy-friends-minetest
item.description:
zughy-friends-minetest
S4 League inspired shooter minigame for Luanti
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: small_fall (Github)
item.author: bas080
item.description:
bas080

License: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1
Download ZIP

item.title: luanti_utils (Github)
item.author: bas080
item.description:
bas080
High level Luanti lua modding utilities that will bring your mods to the next level.
License: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1
Download ZIP

item.title: breasy (Github)
item.author: bas080
item.description:
bas080
A mod that will tell you what the wind is like at a position.
License: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1
Download ZIP

item.title: nether (Github)
item.author: minetest-mods
item.description:
minetest-mods
Nether mod for Luanti/Minetest
License: Unknown

Colorable banisters - mod for Luanti

item.title: CraftoPlus (Gitlab)

Mod for Luanti games.

item.title: drawers (Github)
item.author: minetest-mods
item.description:
minetest-mods
[MTG/MCL2] A Luanti/Minetest Mod adding storage drawers in different sizes and wood types.
License: Other
Download ZIP

item.title: farmtools (Codeberg)
item.author: camelia
item.description:
camelia
Based on the Scythes & Sickles mod by TestificateMods, this (WIP) mod adds various tools to make farming more convenient.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: m7a (Gitlab)
item.author: Mish7913
item.description:
Mish7913
API for Lianti Game
License: Unknown

item.title: Parties (Gitlab)
item.author: zughy-friends-minetest
item.description:
zughy-friends-minetest
Minimalist party mod for Luanti
License: Unknown

item.title: breasy_player (Github)
item.author: bas080
item.description:
bas080
Breasy player adds wind physics to the player.
License: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1
Download ZIP

item.title: breasy_particles (Github)
item.author: bas080
item.description:
bas080
Creates the effect of blizzards, sandstorms and leaves being ripped from trees.
License: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1
Download ZIP

item.title: at (Github)
item.author: bas080
item.description:
bas080
jQuery like wrapper for position/vector
License: Unknown

item.title: audio_lib (Gitlab)
item.author: zughy-friends-minetest
item.description:

Luanti library to easily manage audio files

item.title: Hub (Gitlab)
item.author: zughy-friends-minetest
item.description:
zughy-friends-minetest
A mod to easily manage your minigames server on Luanti
License: Unknown

item.title: worldedge (Github)
item.author: minetest-mods
item.description:
minetest-mods
Set world size in Minetest
License: Other
Download ZIP

item.title: wrench (Github)
item.author: mt-mods
item.description:
mt-mods
The wrench tool allows you to pick up nodes with inventories or other metadata, such as chests, signs, drawers, machines, etc, and transport them intact to another location.
License: Other
Download ZIP

item.title: weapons_lib (Gitlab)
item.author: zughy-friends-minetest
item.description:
zughy-friends-minetest
Luanti library to easily register new weapons
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: mtpaint (Github)
item.author: bas080
item.description:
bas080
Paint like you would in paint, but in 3d.
License: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1
Download ZIP

item.title: Whoopsy Cushion (Gitlab)
item.author: krabNchous
item.description:
krabNchous
Adds a practical joke device (Whoopee Cushion) for your wild potty humor and hilarious fart jokes in Mineclonia game
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: register_timer (Github)
item.author: bas080
item.description:
bas080
Persistent timers for Luanti mods.
License: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1
Download ZIP

item.title: gift_wrapped (Github)
item.author: bas080
item.description:
bas080
Wrap nodes in gift wrapping and place a ribbon ontop to show you really care.
License: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1
Download ZIP

item.title: corruptionmt (Github)
item.author: TheAirplaneMan
item.description:

Adds the Corruption Biome from Terraria to your Minetest Worlds

item.title: crimsonmt (Github)
item.author: TheAirplaneMan
item.description:

item.title: avantisavoia (Codeberg)

A mod for Luanti that adds various WW1-related weapons, tools, and structures.

item.title: DrWho_Tardis (Codeberg)
item.author: Skivling
item.description:
Skivling
A Doctor Who themed Luanti mod that adds various items and nodes, including a working TARDIS. Forked from https://github.com/PiDemon/Taridis_New , which is unmaintained.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: advtrains_horntrack (Codeberg)
item.author: SilverSandstone
item.description:
SilverSandstone
Adds a track for automatically activating train horns in Luanti.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: copper_pipes (Codeberg)
item.author: Codiac
item.description:
Codiac
Replaces blocks and plastic tubes in Pipeworks with copper versions
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: epoxied_concrete (Codeberg)
item.author: somedumbguy
item.description:
somedumbguy
Luanti Mod that uses epoxy from techage to create colored concrete blocks.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: blockhead (Codeberg)
item.author: SilverSandstone
item.description:
SilverSandstone
Lets you put a block on your head in Luanti.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: bed_rock (Codeberg)
item.author: Desour
item.description:

Luanti mod for a rock that you can use as bed
